TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-hunting1_Kainu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ti' kuing ga kainu' kung na hawving hawving na vaw.
S.PHON: tiʔ kuiŋ ɣa kainuʔ kuŋ na ħaw*iŋ ħaw*iŋ na *aw.
S.FORM: ti' kuing ga kainu' kung na hawving hawving na vaw.
S.PHON: tiʔ kuiŋ ɣa kainuʔ kuŋ na ħaw*iŋ ħaw*iŋ na *aw.
S.TRANSL: 我是Kainu',Hawvin的兒子,Hawvin是Vaw的兒子.
I am Kainu', son of Hawvin, son of Vaw.

S.FORM: sunga' su' musa' kuing i sumvu' su ngarux.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ s~ɕuʔ mus~ɕaʔ kuiŋ i s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu ŋarux.
S.FORM: sunga' su' musa' kuing i sumvu' su ngarux.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ s~ɕuʔ mus~ɕaʔ kuiŋ i s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu ŋarux.
S.TRANSL: 我以前會去獵熊.
In the past, I went to shoot bears.

S.FORM: anananu' ga ginalganmu i musa i sumvu su vawwak i lahulahu sunga'.
S.PHON: anananuʔ ɣa ɣinalɣanmu i mus~ɕa i s~ɕum*u s~ɕu *awwak i laħulaħu s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: anananu' ga ginalganmu i musa i sumvu su vawwak i lahulahu sunga'.
S.PHON: anananuʔ ɣa ɣinalɣanmu i mus~ɕa i s~ɕum*u s~ɕu *awwak i laħulaħu s~ɕuŋaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 以前我都有跟隨(人們)去森林裡射野豬.

S.TRANSL: 以前我都有跟隨 去森林裡射野豬.

TRANSL.notes: In the past, I followed (people) to the forest to shoot boars all the time.

S.TRANSL: In the past, I followed to the forest to shoot boars all the time.

S.FORM: musa' kuing ru gi vali kia viru' na itaal sunga'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ kuiŋ ru ɣi *ali kia *iruʔ na itaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: musa' kuing ru gi vali kia viru' na itaal sunga'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ kuiŋ ru ɣi *ali kia *iruʔ na itaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 我去(那裏)因為以前沒有我們的書.

S.TRANSL: 我去 因為以前沒有我們的書.

TRANSL.notes: I went (there), because there were no books of us in the past.

S.TRANSL: I went , because there were no books of us in the past.

S.FORM: musa' ragiax ga mutux asi hakay ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ raɣiax ɣa mutux as~ɕi ħakaj ru.
S.FORM: musa' ragiax ga mutux asi hakay ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ raɣiax ɣa mutux as~ɕi ħakaj ru.
S.TRANSL: 如果我去山上,我會只用走的去.
When I went to the mountain, I would just go on foot.

S.FORM: yumiax i sa qutux su ragiax la ga.
S.PHON: jumiax i s~ɕa qutux s~ɕu raɣiax la ɣa.
S.FORM: yumiax i sa qutux su ragiax la ga.
S.PHON: jumiax i s~ɕa qutux s~ɕu raɣiax la ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 我從一(座山上)走下來.

S.TRANSL: 我從一 走下來.

TRANSL.notes: I went down from a (mountain).

S.TRANSL: I went down from a .

S.FORM: ini' vaqi ku inuwahan.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi ku inuwaħan.
S.FORM: ini' vaqi ku inuwahan.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi ku inuwaħan.

TRANSL.notes: (我)不知道走過的路.

S.TRANSL: 不知道走過的路.

TRANSL.notes: (I) didn't know the road traveled.

S.TRANSL: didn't know the road traveled.

S.FORM: ini' vaqi i ku inuwahan la ga asiki kutan ku kahuniq gi naki vaqun ku inuwahan ru'.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi i ku inuwaħan la ɣa as~ɕiki kutan ku kaħuniq ɣi naki *aqun ku inuwaħan ruʔ.
S.FORM: ini' vaqi i ku inuwahan la ga asiki kutan ku kahuniq gi naki vaqun ku inuwahan ru'.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi i ku inuwaħan la ɣa as~ɕiki kutan ku kaħuniq ɣi naki *aqun ku inuwaħan ruʔ.
S.TRANSL: 如果不知道來的路,就必須要砍樹,這樣才會知道來的路.

TRANSL.notes: If (you) did not know the road traveled, (you) needed to chop down the trees, so that you would know the road traveled.

S.TRANSL: If did not know the road traveled, needed to chop down the trees, so that you would know the road traveled.

S.FORM: naki ini' i putukari'.
S.PHON: naki iniʔ i putukariʔ.
S.FORM: naki ini' i putukari'.
S.PHON: naki iniʔ i putukariʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你才不會迷路.
This way you wouldn't get lost.

S.FORM: mutukari'su' la ga pasiquawsu' inu' ga qatsu' vavaqun.
S.PHON: mutukariʔs~ɕuʔ la ɣa pas~ɕiquaws~ɕuʔ inuʔ ɣa qats~ɕuʔ *a*aqun.
S.FORM: mutukari'su' la ga pasiquawsu' inu' ga qatsu' vavaqun.
S.PHON: mutukariʔs~ɕuʔ la ɣa pas~ɕiquaws~ɕuʔ inuʔ ɣa qats~ɕuʔ *a*aqun.
S.TRANSL: 如果你迷路的話,你不知道你會在哪裡出現.
If you get lost, you don't know where you will appear.

S.FORM: qatsu' laluwan na squliq musa' kumiyum.
S.PHON: qats~ɕuʔ laluwan na s~ɕquliq mus~ɕaʔ kumijum.
S.FORM: qatsu' laluwan na squliq musa' kumiyum.
S.PHON: qats~ɕuʔ laluwan na s~ɕquliq mus~ɕaʔ kumijum.
S.TRANSL: 你不會被搜尋的人找到.
You wouldn't be found by people who go for a search.

S.FORM: ru' nanu' tiku kai'mu sawni' ka maha u asiki kutan tikay ku kahuniq gi naki vaqun su ku a 'usa.
S.PHON: ruʔ nanuʔ tiku kaiʔmu s~ɕawniʔ ka maħa u as~ɕiki kutan tikaj ku kaħuniq ɣi naki *aqun s~ɕu ku a ʔus~ɕa.
S.FORM: ru' nanu' tiku kai'mu sawni' ka maha u asiki kutan tikay ku kahuniq gi naki vaqun su ku a 'usa.
S.PHON: ruʔ nanuʔ tiku kaiʔmu s~ɕawniʔ ka maħa u as~ɕiki kutan tikaj ku kaħuniq ɣi naki *aqun s~ɕu ku a ʔus~ɕa.

TRANSL.notes: (像)我剛才說的,必須要砍一點樹才會知道要走哪裡.

S.TRANSL: 我剛才說的,必須要砍一點樹才會知道要走哪裡.

TRANSL.notes: (Like) what I just said, it's necessary to chop a little wood so that you know where to go.

S.TRANSL: what I just said, it's necessary to chop a little wood so that you know where to go.

S.FORM: ru musa' i i sumvu' su yapit ini' ga vawwak sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i i s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu japit iniʔ ɣa *awwak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ru musa' i i sumvu' su yapit ini' ga vawwak sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i i s~ɕum*uʔ s~ɕu japit iniʔ ɣa *awwak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我以前去射飛鼠或山豬
I went to shoot polatouches or boars in the past.

S.FORM: mutux i payux vay ku qasinu sunga' gi nanu' gi uwehti' ku lahulahu.
S.PHON: mutux i pajux *aj ku qas~ɕinu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣi nanuʔ ɣi uweħtiʔ ku laħulaħu.
S.FORM: mutux i payux vay ku qasinu sunga' gi nanu' gi uwehti' ku lahulahu.
S.PHON: mutux i pajux *aj ku qas~ɕinu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣi nanuʔ ɣi uweħtiʔ ku laħulaħu.
S.TRANSL: 以前真的會有很多野獸,因為森林很寬廣.
There would really be many beasts in the past, because the forest was widespread.

S.FORM: ru anananu' ga kia.
S.PHON: ru anananuʔ ɣa kia.
S.FORM: ru anananu' ga kia.
S.PHON: ru anananuʔ ɣa kia.
S.TRANSL: 什麼東西都有.
There was everything.

S.FORM: ngarux ru miit para ru kakavahniq ga.
S.PHON: ŋarux ru miit para ru kaka*aħniq ɣa.
S.FORM: ngarux ru miit para ru kakavahniq ga.
S.PHON: ŋarux ru miit para ru kaka*aħniq ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 像是有熊、山羊、山羌、還有鳥.
Like bears, goats, muntjacs, and birds.

S.FORM: mutux i alun na nku nku navakis halan naha' sumvu'.
S.PHON: mutux i alun na nku nku na*akis~ɕ ħalan naħaʔ s~ɕum*uʔ.
S.FORM: mutux i alun na nku nku navakis halan naha' sumvu'.
S.PHON: mutux i alun na nku nku na*akis~ɕ ħalan naħaʔ s~ɕum*uʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 老人會去打獵,把(獵物)拿回來.

S.TRANSL: 老人會去打獵,把 拿回來.

TRANSL.notes: Old men would go shooting and take (the prey) back.

S.TRANSL: Old men would go shooting and take back.

S.FORM: vuun naha' ru nanu' a mutux naha' sipanga ru rasun naha' imuag.
S.PHON: *uun naħaʔ ru nanuʔ a mutux naħaʔ s~ɕipaŋa ru ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuaɣ.
S.FORM: vuun naha' ru nanu' a mutux naha' sipanga ru rasun naha' imuag.
S.PHON: *uun naħaʔ ru nanuʔ a mutux naħaʔ s~ɕipaŋa ru ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuaɣ.

TRANSL.notes: 他們去打獵,會把(獵物)用背的帶回家.

S.TRANSL: 他們去打獵,會把 用背的帶回家.

TRANSL.notes: They went shooting, and would bear (the prey) on their back home.

S.TRANSL: They went shooting, and would bear on their back home.

S.FORM: gi raranga' naha' cku qutuxnia' su'imuag gi.
S.PHON: ɣi raraŋaʔ naħaʔ ʦ~ʨku qutuxniaʔ s~ɕuʔimuaɣ ɣi.
S.FORM: gi raranga' naha' cku qutuxnia' su'imuag gi.
S.PHON: ɣi raraŋaʔ naħaʔ ʦ~ʨku qutuxniaʔ s~ɕuʔimuaɣ ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 他們要紓解一家人.
They will relieve his family.

S.FORM: ukas ku naniqun naha' sunga'.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku naniqun naħaʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: ukas ku naniqun naha' sunga'.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku naniqun naħaʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們過去沒有什麼東西吃.
That's because they have little to eat in the past.

S.FORM: i vali kia ku slaq ka patuwawun naha'.
S.PHON: i *ali kia ku s~ɕlaq ka patuwawun naħaʔ.
S.FORM: i vali kia ku slaq ka patuwawun naha'.
S.PHON: i *ali kia ku s~ɕlaq ka patuwawun naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有農田讓他們耕作.
There was no farming field for them to farm.

S.FORM: asi qaniq su qaqasinu gi ukas ku' pintuawan naha' ka nanu pati' ru vuax.
S.PHON: as~ɕi qaniq s~ɕu qaqas~ɕinu ɣi ukas~ɕ kuʔ pintuawan naħaʔ ka nanu patiʔ ru *uax.
S.FORM: asi qaniq su qaqasinu gi ukas ku' pintuawan naha' ka nanu pati' ru vuax.
S.PHON: as~ɕi qaniq s~ɕu qaqas~ɕinu ɣi ukas~ɕ kuʔ pintuawan naħaʔ ka nanu patiʔ ru *uax.
S.TRANSL: 他們只有吃獸肉因為沒有米的收成.
They could only eat beasts because there was no harvest of rice.

S.FORM: ru yaku qasinu ku niqun naha'.
S.PHON: ru jaku qas~ɕinu ku niqun naħaʔ.
S.FORM: ru yaku qasinu ku niqun naha'.
S.PHON: ru jaku qas~ɕinu ku niqun naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們吃那個野獸.
They ate that beast.

S.FORM: ru' atu' na sumvu' ga rasun imuag rasun imuag ru.
S.PHON: ruʔ atuʔ na s~ɕum*uʔ ɣa ras~ɕun imuaɣ ras~ɕun imuaɣ ru.
S.FORM: ru' atu' na sumvu' ga rasun imuag rasun imuag ru.
S.PHON: ruʔ atuʔ na s~ɕum*uʔ ɣa ras~ɕun imuaɣ ras~ɕun imuaɣ ru.

TRANSL.notes: 如果射獵完,(他們)把獵物帶回家.

S.TRANSL: 如果射獵完, 把獵物帶回家.
If after shooting, they bring back to house.

S.FORM: nial numaga' imuag ku kakanayril.
S.PHON: nial numaɣaʔ imuaɣ ku kakanajril.
S.FORM: nial numaga' imuag ku kakanayril.
S.PHON: nial numaɣaʔ imuaɣ ku kakanajril.
S.TRANSL: 女人在家裡等.
Women were waiting in the house.

S.FORM: atu' na parux ku sinvu' ga nanu' u sitaku sikal sikaal cku a 'ulaqi' maha halayta' i mapanga gi.
S.PHON: atuʔ na parux ku s~ɕin*uʔ ɣa nanuʔ u s~ɕitaku s~ɕikal s~ɕikaal ʦ~ʨku a ʔulaqiʔ maħa ħalajtaʔ i mapaŋa ɣi.
S.FORM: atu' na parux ku sinvu' ga nanu' u sitaku sikal sikaal cku a 'ulaqi' maha halayta' i mapanga gi.
S.PHON: atuʔ na parux ku s~ɕin*uʔ ɣa nanuʔ u s~ɕitaku s~ɕikal s~ɕikaal ʦ~ʨku a ʔulaqiʔ maħa ħalajtaʔ i mapaŋa ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 如果他們射到許多,會告訴小孩,「我們去背回來」.
If they shot much, they would tell the kids, "Let's go to bring back".

S.FORM: ini' vaqi mapanga' na saxa' gi payux ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi mapaŋaʔ na s~ɕaxaʔ ɣi pajux ɣa.
S.FORM: ini' vaqi mapanga' na saxa' gi payux ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ *aqi mapaŋaʔ na s~ɕaxaʔ ɣi pajux ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 一個人搬不動,因為太多.
One man can't bear it, because it's too much.

S.FORM: ru nanu' rasun ku sinsining ru maha halayta' i magal ku sinvu'mu.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ ras~ɕun ku s~ɕins~ɕiniŋ ru maħa ħalajtaʔ i maɣal ku s~ɕin*uʔmu.
S.FORM: ru nanu' rasun ku sinsining ru maha halayta' i magal ku sinvu'mu.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ ras~ɕun ku s~ɕins~ɕiniŋ ru maħa ħalajtaʔ i maɣal ku s~ɕin*uʔmu.
S.TRANSL: 他們帶年輕人,說「我們去拿回我射的獵物」.
They led the youngster, saying "Let's go bring back the prey I hunted'.

S.FORM: gi parux ku sinvu' nanu rasun rasun ku sinsining ru.
S.PHON: ɣi parux ku s~ɕin*uʔ nanu ras~ɕun ras~ɕun ku s~ɕins~ɕiniŋ ru.
S.FORM: gi parux ku sinvu' nanu rasun rasun ku sinsining ru.
S.PHON: ɣi parux ku s~ɕin*uʔ nanu ras~ɕun ras~ɕun ku s~ɕins~ɕiniŋ ru.

TRANSL.notes: 因為有太多要拿回來,所以(他們)帶年輕人.

S.TRANSL: 因為有太多要拿回來,所以 帶年輕人.

TRANSL.notes: Because there was too much to bring back, (they) brought the youngsters.

S.TRANSL: Because there was too much to bring back, brought the youngsters.

S.FORM: sipanga' naha' ru rasun naha' imuag.
S.PHON: s~ɕipaŋaʔ naħaʔ ru ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuaɣ.
S.FORM: sipanga' naha' ru rasun naha' imuag.
S.PHON: s~ɕipaŋaʔ naħaʔ ru ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 他們背在身上帶回家.
They bore it on back and brought it home.

S.FORM: rasun naha' imuaug ru talan kahavaw.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuauɣ ru talan kaħa*aw.
S.FORM: rasun naha' imuaug ru talan kahavaw.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun naħaʔ imuauɣ ru talan kaħa*aw.
S.TRANSL: 他們帶回家,所有人都看到.
They brought it back home and everyone saw them.

S.FORM: nial imuaug ga paqasun naha' ru.
S.PHON: nial imuauɣ ɣa paqas~ɕun naħaʔ ru.
S.FORM: nial imuaug ga paqasun naha' ru.
S.PHON: nial imuauɣ ɣa paqas~ɕun naħaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 家人很開心.
The family were happy.

S.FORM: numaga' gi i panuvuwaw su quaw.
S.PHON: numaɣaʔ ɣi i panu*uwaw s~ɕu quaw.
S.FORM: numaga' gi i panuvuwaw su quaw.
S.PHON: numaɣaʔ ɣi i panu*uwaw s~ɕu quaw.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)準備酒喝.

S.TRANSL: 準備酒喝.

TRANSL.notes: (They) prepared wine for drinking.

S.TRANSL: prepared wine for drinking.

S.FORM: manuvuaw su quaw la ru nanu' gi paqasun naha' la ga.
S.PHON: manu*uaw s~ɕu quaw la ru nanuʔ ɣi paqas~ɕun naħaʔ la ɣa.
S.FORM: manuvuaw su quaw la ru nanu' gi paqasun naha' la ga.
S.PHON: manu*uaw s~ɕu quaw la ru nanuʔ ɣi paqas~ɕun naħaʔ la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 喝完酒之後,他們很開心.
After they drank wine, they got happy.

S.FORM: elev panyugi' la.
S.PHON: ele* panjuɣiʔ la.
S.FORM: elev panyugi' la.
S.PHON: ele* panjuɣiʔ la.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)跳舞.

S.TRANSL: 跳舞.

TRANSL.notes: (They) dance.

S.TRANSL: dance.

S.FORM: ru niqun naha' ku tahkun naha' ku inaras ru niqun naha'.
S.PHON: ru niqun naħaʔ ku taħkun naħaʔ ku inaras~ɕ ru niqun naħaʔ.
S.FORM: ru niqun naha' ku tahkun naha' ku inaras ru niqun naha'.
S.PHON: ru niqun naħaʔ ku taħkun naħaʔ ku inaras~ɕ ru niqun naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們就吃,烹煮和享用帶回來的東西.
They ate, and cooked and ate the thing they brought back.

S.FORM: sua' ana ku 'ulaqi' uwi ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕuaʔ ana ku ʔulaqiʔ uwi ɣa.
S.FORM: sua' ana ku 'ulaqi' uwi ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕuaʔ ana ku ʔulaqiʔ uwi ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 連小孩也(來吃).

S.TRANSL: 連小孩也 .

TRANSL.notes: Even children (ate), too.

S.TRANSL: Even children , too.

S.FORM: ini' i qavaq i sasalun qasinu ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ i qa*aq i s~ɕas~ɕalun qas~ɕinu ɣa.
S.FORM: ini' i qavaq i sasalun qasinu ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ i qa*aq i s~ɕas~ɕalun qas~ɕinu ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)不知道野獸的名稱.

S.TRANSL: 不知道野獸的名稱.

TRANSL.notes: (The children) didn't know the names of the beasts.

S.TRANSL: didn't know the names of the beasts.

S.FORM: sahahiya' naha' niqun gi qaat u minaniq su nak minukahul i lahulahu.
S.PHON: s~ɕaħaħijaʔ naħaʔ niqun ɣi qaat u minaniq s~ɕu nak minukaħul i laħulaħu.
S.FORM: sahahiya' naha' niqun gi qaat u minaniq su nak minukahul i lahulahu.
S.PHON: s~ɕaħaħijaʔ naħaʔ niqun ɣi qaat u minaniq s~ɕu nak minukaħul i laħulaħu.
S.TRANSL: 他們所吃的東西很美味,因為他們沒吃過來自森林的東西.
What they ate was delicious. That's because they had never eaten things from the forest.

S.FORM: nanu' yaku yani ku siqiyanux naha' ru sku hani la ga ini' paska la ga ku kinqiyanux la.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jaku jani ku s~ɕiqijanux naħaʔ ru s~ɕku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕka la ɣa ku kinqijanux la.
S.FORM: nanu' yaku yani ku siqiyanux naha' ru sku hani la ga ini' paska la ga ku kinqiyanux la.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jaku jani ku s~ɕiqijanux naħaʔ ru s~ɕku ħani la ɣa iniʔ pas~ɕka la ɣa ku kinqijanux la.
S.TRANSL: 他們賴以生活的和現在不一樣.
What they lived by was not the same as the present.

S.FORM: kinqianux sawni' hiya' la ga anananu' ga kia la ru mutuxta' i kia tikay ku pila' ga.
S.PHON: kinqianux s~ɕawniʔ ħijaʔ la ɣa anananuʔ ɣa kia la ru mutuxtaʔ i kia tikaj ku pilaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: kinqianux sawni' hiya' la ga anananu' ga kia la ru mutuxta' i kia tikay ku pila' ga.
S.PHON: kinqianux s~ɕawniʔ ħijaʔ la ɣa anananuʔ ɣa kia la ru mutuxtaʔ i kia tikaj ku pilaʔ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 至於現在的生活,如果有一點錢,我們會去(做某事).

S.TRANSL: 至於現在的生活,如果有一點錢,我們會去 .

TRANSL.notes: As for the life now, if with a little money, we would (do something).

S.TRANSL: As for the life now, if with a little money, we would .

S.FORM: musa'mu vavaynay.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔmu *a*ajnaj.
S.FORM: musa'mu vavaynay.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔmu *a*ajnaj.
S.TRANSL: 我會去買東西.

TRANSL.notes: I will go to buy (something).

S.TRANSL: I will go to buy .

S.FORM: musa' mavaynay hi' i ku ku tinqalangan nku saysayho.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ma*ajnaj ħiʔ i ku ku tinqalaŋan nku s~ɕajs~ɕajħo.
S.FORM: musa' mavaynay hi' i ku ku tinqalangan nku saysayho.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ma*ajnaj ħiʔ i ku ku tinqalaŋan nku s~ɕajs~ɕajħo.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)去漢人的聚落買肉.

S.TRANSL: 去漢人的聚落買肉.

TRANSL.notes: (We) go the Han people's village to buy meat.

S.TRANSL: go the Han people's village to buy meat.

S.FORM: rasun naha' i imuag ru niqun naha' maska' cku.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun naħaʔ i imuaɣ ru niqun naħaʔ mas~ɕkaʔ ʦ~ʨku.
S.FORM: rasun naha' i imuag ru niqun naha' maska' cku.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun naħaʔ i imuaɣ ru niqun naħaʔ mas~ɕkaʔ ʦ~ʨku.
S.TRANSL: 他們把肉帶回來,還是以相同方式吃掉.

TRANSL.notes: They bring (the meat) back, and eat it in the same way.

S.TRANSL: They bring back, and eat it in the same way.

S.FORM: musa' i ragiax sunga' ku kinqianux uwe la gi.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i raɣiax s~ɕuŋaʔ ku kinqianux uwe la ɣi.
S.FORM: musa' i ragiax sunga' ku kinqianux uwe la gi.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i raɣiax s~ɕuŋaʔ ku kinqianux uwe la ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 就像他們以前去山上的生活一樣.
Just like the life where they went to the mountain in the past.

S.FORM: tiku hani la ga pila' nku lawkah la.
S.PHON: tiku ħani la ɣa pilaʔ nku lawkaħ la.
S.FORM: tiku hani la ga pila' nku lawkah la.
S.PHON: tiku ħani la ɣa pilaʔ nku lawkaħ la.
S.TRANSL: 錢現在很強勢.
Money is strong now.

S.FORM: ru halan naha' i mavaynay ku vuax ru naniqun ru uahan naha' maniq imuag.
S.PHON: ru ħalan naħaʔ i ma*ajnaj ku *uax ru naniqun ru uaħan naħaʔ maniq imuaɣ.
S.FORM: ru halan naha' i mavaynay ku vuax ru naniqun ru uahan naha' maniq imuag.
S.PHON: ru ħalan naħaʔ i ma*ajnaj ku *uax ru naniqun ru uaħan naħaʔ maniq imuaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 他們去買米和食物,回來在家吃.
They go to buy rice and food back, and eat in the house.

S.FORM: maska' ku kinqianux sunga'.
S.PHON: mas~ɕkaʔ ku kinqianux s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: maska' ku kinqianux sunga'.
S.PHON: mas~ɕkaʔ ku kinqianux s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 生活和以前一樣.
The life is the same as in the past.
